title: Gambled
description: Adds a bit of gamble to your world!
body:
![Title GAMBLED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cd39b14f4dade7719ff2c74afab5bc95fbeab7.png) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/built-with/java_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/built-with/java_64h.png?raw=true)

Add a bit gamble to your world!

Now you can find gambling machines in your world. There are two games: Rocket (aka Crash) and Upgrader.


Rocket (Crash) Game

There are four types of Rocket game: gold, emerald, diamond and netherite. Players can deposit their items into machine in deposit time and withdraw while "rocket" is going up. On rocket crash, all unwithdrawn items would be lost!





Upgrader Game

Player can put his item into input slot and select multiplier. Based on chosen multiplier, day and item, random rewards would be generated. Player can choose one of them and spin the roulette. If roulette pointer lands on green zone, player gets reward, else - player loses his item.
